---
title: "論文"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="container-fluid content">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<img src="images/header.jpg" class="header-image" alt="ヘッダー画像">
</div>
</div>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-12">

<h2 class="mt-4">プレプリント</h2>

<div class="publication">
<p class="pub-title">Moment of inertia for pair rotation: Interplay between order parameter and shell structure</p>
<p class="pub-authors">Chisato Ruike, Nobuo Hinohara, Takashi Nakatsukasa</p>
<p class="pub-journal">arXiv:2504.11908 (2025)</p>
<p><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.11908" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> arXiv</a></p>
</div>

<h2>査読付き論文</h2>

<div class="publication">
<p class="pub-title">Collective-subspace requantization for sub-barrier fusion reactions: Inertial functions for collective motions</p>
<p class="pub-authors">Chisato Ruike, Kai Wen, Nobuo Hinohara, Takashi Nakatsukasa</p>
<p class="pub-journal">EPJ Web of Conferences <strong>306</strong>, 01006 (2024)</p>
<p><a href="https://doi.org/10.1051/epjconf/202430601006" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> DOI</a></p>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
